heading: Definition of State
label: 6717 Definition of State
text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “State” means any State of the United States, the District of Columbia, any territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Islands, and the Northern Mariana Islands.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§ 301 et seq.) of title III of , which enacted this subchapter and , Banks and Banking. For complete classification of this subtitle to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 106–102section 1831x of Title 12
